name: Shrimp Toast
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice onion, water chestnuts, and shrimp together until finely minced. Place in a small bowl. Add egg, salt, pepper, and cornstarch. Mix thoroughly. Spread the mixture thinly on slices of bread.
2. Heat oil in a wok to about halfway up its height. Turn heat to high. Test with a bread crust: if it browns quickly to a golden color, the oil is ready. If it doesn't brown or turns dark brown, turn off the heat and let it cool for at least 5 minutes before reheating.
3. Place a slice of bread with the shrimp mixture on one side in the hot oil. Deep fry for about 3 minutes until golden brown. Flip and fry the reverse side. Remove to paper towels to drain excess oil. Repeat until all slices are fried.
4. Cut the fried slices into strips or triangles. Serve immediately.
NOTE: The shrimp can be minced ahead of time and frying done just before serving for a convenient after-theater snack.
